title: Garlicky Chewy Irish Rhubarb Stir-fry
description: This savory dish combines tender and chewy rhubarb with garlic in a light sauté, making it a perfect vegetarian-friendly accompaniment to any meal.

ingredients.name: Optional: 1/4 cup chopped fresh herbs (thyme, parsley, or chives)

instructions: In a large skillet over medium heat, add olive oil and sauté onion for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant but not browned.
Add chopped rhubarb and toss gently to coat with the garlic mixture. Season with salt and pepper as needed.
Transfer mixture into a baking dish or shallow oven-safe pan. If using, sprinkle herbs on top if desired.
Bake in preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes until edges start to turn golden brown and rhubarb is tender but still chewy.
Serve warm as a side dish or main course depending on the portion size.
